results.title: Stephen A. Smith apologizes to Knicks on stage: ‘I was beyond wrong’
results.description: The New York Knicks exceeded all expectations this season to secure an NBA championship and a few of their players kept receipts. Knicks guards Jalen Brunson and Josh Hart recently hosted a live episode of “The Roommates Show” with ESPN personality Stephen A.

results.title: UNC baseball on edge after loss to Oklahoma in Game 1 of MCWS finals
results.description: “An underdog is still a freakin’ dog.” That was Mississippi State softball’s rallying cry when it knocked out Oklahoma in the NCAA Tournament. It appears the Sooners baseball team adopted the slogan for itself, and on Saturday North Carolina became...

results.title: Raiders WR Jack Bech hosts free youth football camp at STM
results.description: Las Vegas Raiders WR Jack Bech hosted a free youth football camp at Cougar Stadium at his alma mater St. Thomas More. The event brought together more than 150 campers and featured Bech's former LSU teammates, including Garrett Nussmeier and Maason Smith.

results.title: Surprise U.S. Open contender admits he 'hated every minute' at Shinnecock Hills
results.description: After two relatively soft days, players got a taste of the real Shinnecock Hills at the U.S. Open on Saturday, but Emiliano Grillo gave himself a shot at an unlikely victory after a stellar third round
